features.name: Substructure Search
features.description: Panel-based substructure search against the DrugBank Open Structures dataset, returning matching drug compounds for a drawn or pasted molecule.
features.evidence_summary: Function name explicitly encodes 'Substructure Search' under the Databases > DrugBank menu path, and the readme describes it as a primary capability of the plugin.

features.name: Similarity Search
features.description: Panel-based molecular similarity search against the DrugBank Open Structures dataset, displaying similarity scores alongside each matching compound.
features.evidence_summary: Function name encodes 'Similarity Search' under Databases > DrugBank; the v1.0.16 changelog entry 'Added similarity score for compounds in the similarity panel' directly tracks this feature's evolution.

features.name: Drug Name to Molecule Lookup
features.description: Converter that resolves a drug name string to its corresponding molecular structure using the DrugBank dataset.
features.evidence_summary: The 'Drug Name Molecule' converter function is a standalone name-to-structure lookup, distinct from the search panels and backed by the DrugBank compound registry.

features.name: Package Initialization
features.description: Internal bootstrapping routine that initializes the DrugBank plugin on load.
features.evidence_summary: The init-role function plus developer-facing docs (claude.md, credits.md) describe plugin scaffolding rather than any user-facing capability.
